creator: freebsd@contenidosonline.com.ar
text:
I have installed mc from packages and it don't create any .mc user directory for save setup

	
For example, if you change the configuration of mc, save it, this is not saved anywhere.

Creating the user directory .mc manually, the setting is saved.

Fix: 

Creating the user directory .mc manually, the setting is saved.
How-To-Repeat: run mc

Option - Configuration - disable "show Hidden files" -- ok

Save setup

exit mc

run mc 

the hidden files are showed anyway
